title: John Novak
compiled_truth: John Novak is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-09), John Novak sent 12 and received 256 emails, totalling 268 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (6), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (4), [Mary Joyce](people/mary-joyce) (3), [Pam Butler](people/pam-butler) (3), [Kent Castleman](people/kent-castleman) (3).
